description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a predominantly black upper, accented by white stitching and a distinctive white side stripe. The shoe features a padded collar for ankle support and a white rubber sole with visible signs of wear and some discoloration. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with white laces threaded through metal eyelets. The heel area displays reinforced stitching and a red rectangular patch at the back, likely indicating branding. The overall design is sporty and urban, suitable for casual wear in city environments.
description: A black high-top sneaker with white accents, criss-cross laces, and a white rubber sole showing some wear. Features a padded collar and a distinctive side stripe.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white side stripe, black upper, and white stitching details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the criss-cross lacing and toe cap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features as view 0, showing the side stripe and stitching.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded collar, reinforced stitching, and a red rectangular patch at the heel.
attribute_logo: White side stripe on both sides; red rectangular patch on the heel.
